title: Extract Meeting Dates
scenario: Write a Python script that can extract meeting dates from a given string. The string will be in the format 'Meet on [date] at [time]'. The target output should be an array of dates in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format. Ensure the script can handle multiple meetings in a single string, and that the dates are extracted correctly.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the script adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the Python code has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the script correctly extracts the meeting dates from the input string and returns them in the correct format.
